programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - True Colors / Recycled Koopa: Kooky and Cheatsy use a special paint to turn all the Mushroom People either red or blue and trick the two colors into hating each other. / When the Koopalings can't get away with dumping their trash in the Mushroom Kingdom, they warp it all to Brooklyn.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - The Venice Menace / Super Koopa: When an Italian Pizzaman mysteriously arrives in Desert Land and reports "a sea monster", Mario and friends go to Venice, Italy to investigate who is ruining Venice. / Kooky makes King Koopa a super power pendant which only works in the real world so he goes to Paris, France to rule which Mario and Luigi must stop a super powered King Koopa.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Secret of Rockyhenge / The Case of The Crimson Car: Ranger Raoul accidentally knows over one of the giant stones at Rockyhenge. After he calls the Paq in to help lift it back up into place, Biggie D, Gronk, and Himari inadvertently make it worse. They have to scramble to put everything back into place before the Head Ranger shows up. / After Miguel's beloved car is stolen, the Paq is tasked with finding out who did it. Dawkins and Tibbs are on the case, but they have no idea the notorious thief James Moriarty is behind the theft. Dawkins and Tibbs must use every investigative skill they have to the test to find the criminal and the stolen car.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Band Aid / Marooned: Three kids that Shaq has mentored in the Boys & Girls Club have a band but they can't find a ride to their first live show. Shaq sends Gronk, Bates and Boone to go get each kid but they have some challenges on the way to the club. When they finally get there, more bad news may keep the show from going on as planned. The Shaq Paq are determined to figure out a way to help the kids perform. / Hattie, a friend of Shaq, shows off her new hot air balloon business. Himari, Gronk, and Fleming decided to climb in, but a sudden wind gust rips out the anchor and carries them away. Stranded on a deserted island, the trio must find a way to survive until Shaq and the rest of the Paq can rescue them.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Honey, I Digitized the Pac-Man: When Dr. Buttocks infects all the computers of Pac-World with his virus ghosts, a digitized Pac must travel through cyberspace and stop the invasion before the evil scientist can download the location of the Repository and the Tree of Life.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Santa Pac: Betrayus plans to put an end to PacWorld's most festive holiday by getting rid of the holiday's icon - Santa Pac.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Pop Rocks: The team learns Pop Fizz used to be a rock star, one half of the duo "Pop and the 'Gang".

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Beard Science: Kaos realizes the key to the success he covets lies in having hair... so he uses his magic to steal Master Eon's beard.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Sneaking Lying Ninja Koopas: King Koopa plans to kidnap Prince Hugo so he can turn him into a poodle and turns Cheatsy, Bully, Big Mouth and Kooky into Sneaky Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas which Mario and friends would have to save the prince. / When Kootie Pie whines that she did not have enough presents on her birthday, King Koopa takes the White House to the Mushroom Kingdom so Kootie Pie can be empress of America which Mario and friends must save the president.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Reign Storm: Princess Toadstool and Toad go to Hawaii for a vacation while leaving the Mario Bros. in charge of the Mushroom Kingdom. / King Koopa and Kooky plan to go to the place where the Mario Bros. have gone into the Mushroom Kingdom by using a time travel device.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Roadsterball / Blond is Back!: Klaus' longtime nemesis, Niccolo Tessio, challenges the Paq to a game of Roadsterball. Team leader Klaus only chooses the fastest and strongest of the Paq to help, but it doesn't go the way he planned. Klaus must figure out a way to utilize all of the strengths of the Paq members or they'll loose the game. / Shaq has a big surprise for Fleming. He's invited the actor who played James Blond, Ian Connery, to come visit. Ian always wished they could have gone on a real mission together and Fleming feels the same way.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Close Encounters of the Bad Kind / Gold Fever!: Dawkins and Himari are driving back to the garage at night and he is pointing out different stars to her and she is bored. Dawkins sees a strange star that he's never seen before. Then, the star moves across the sky and crashes in the distance. An alien captures them, intending to take them back to his planet as spare parts and they must find a way to escape before the ship takes off. / Boone tells The Paq about the story of The Lost Scotchman's Mine, a legendary treasure buried deep in the hills or Orlanta. Is it a myth or real? Fleming, Gronk, and Himari all decide to find out.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Pac's Very Scary Halloween - Part One: Forever unable to come up with a creature powerful enough to vanquish Pac-Man, Betrayus employs the diabolical Dr. Pacenstein (who is now a scheming brain-in-a-jar) to create a mega monster.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.title: The Monsters and the Mech!
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all - in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: The Spectral Lands
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: The Great Zane Robbery
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Close Encounter of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Lazy con-man Bo Beagle has the Choas Emerald ring stuck on his finger, and Robotnik wants it for one of his evil schemes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik learns that the most powerful gemstone -- able to create life itself -- is located in Prehistoric Times.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strenghs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and Kord have been trying to create a fusion shot: two slugs shot at exactly the same time that can merge their powers! But they'll need to mod Eli's blaster to handle it. In search of the one missing part that will complete Eli's Double Barreled Blaster, the gang journey to the Scrap Heap, a junk yard cavern of epic proportions. Finding the part isn't easy. Getting out with it alive past Boss Ember and his Scrap Force is nearly impossible.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape. Allowing it past the barrier would mean unprecedented peril - not only for Slugterra, but our world above too!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra - unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it. Mercenaries come out of the woodwork hoping for the prize, but the Shane Gang aim to stop it for free. That's what they do. It turns out this creature is more dangerous than anyone could imagine, and one by one, the hunters are taken out of the game-leaving only Eli and the reviled STOCKER remaining.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk. But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.desc: A 9-year-old boy moves to a lakeside village and befriends a captain who claims a mythical sea creature named Nessie lives in their peaceful waters. When Nessie proves to be real, the boy embarks on a special mission to save the town!

programme.title: Winx Club
programme.desc: Winx Club is a fantasy saga revolving around six fairies and their adventures. The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: "Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.desc: Un mensaje cruel y sangriento llega a manos de Sara. Esa entrega pone en peligro el Cártel de Jalisco. El Teca sabe que pincharon el teléfono de la Tuti. Salvador expresa su amor a Begoña.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara confía en Manuel para buscar otro refugio y es momento de hacer las paces. Begoña quiere paz mental y el resultado es adverso. El Teca pone a prueba a la Tuti. Josefina sufre.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: La Tuti cae en una emboscada y Erick somete al hijo del Teca, con quien enviará un mensaje a su padre. El fiscal sigue la señal del teléfono de su hija. Aracely descubre los crímenes de Mario.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: En medio de la euforia, Erick asfixia a Álvaro y le envía un regalo al Teca. Begoña toma una decisión sobre su futuro. Aracely busca vengar la muerte de Horacio. Sara interroga a la Tuti.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: El Teca se vuelve loco y amenaza con matar a todos sus hombres. La Tuti debe someterse a un detector de mentiras. Alguien oye las plegarias de Begoña. Rosa le da información del Indio al Teca.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: El Teca subestima al Indio y lo tilda de segundón. Amaro lo desafía para que lo mate de una buena vez. Salvador se niega a dejar ir a Begoña y hace una jugada peligrosa.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Ahora que tienen un enemigo en común, el Indio contacta a Sara para entregarle al Teca en bandeja de plata. Miriam toma una decisión sobre su hijo. Salvador ayuda a Begoña en secreto.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Raquel demanda a su mamá, quien no le da su dinero, compite con ella y le quita los novios. Elizabeth se niega a que el papá de su hija regrese porque es adicto y un mal ejemplo para su nieta.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Fue por lana Saco de maíz
programme.desc: Manuel dio sus ahorros para pagar el rescate del supuesto secuestro de su hermano, descubre que es una estafa. Juan Camilo se niega a volver a Colombia a cultivar maíz como quieren sus padres.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Andrea tuvo relaciones con el esposo de su maestra, ella lo denunció sin saber que era gay y el niño se suicidó. Catherine sufre de acoso en silencio, y un amigo lo publica.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Carlos acaba de salir de prisión y su esposa acaba de entrar, luego de intentar asesinarlo. La hija de ambos está con la tía Catalina, quien se disputa la custodia de la niña con Carlos, que nunca la quiso. En otro caso, Alex pasó unos días en casa de una pareja de amigos que hacían el amor con tanto énfasis que él se sintió con el derecho de aprovechar un momento que su amigo fue al baño y se metió en la cama con la mujer, quien ahora lo acusa de violación.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Vagina box Padre de su nieto
programme.desc: Adriana sale cubierta con una caja con agujeros en sus senos y su vagina para que le den propina. En otro caso, José es padre y abuelo del hijo de Elizabeth porque ella está presa.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Salida a la fuerza El médico de la familia
programme.desc: Isabel estaba en el parque con su amante, Raúl les tomó fotos y las subió a Internet. También, Alejandro trabaja en su clínica como médico, pero no tiene título ni estudios.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El papá de Andrea abusó de ella desde sus catorce años, Lucy le decía que no denunciara los hechos. La cuñada de Kobby lo ayudó a relajarse antes de un casting, haciéndole sexo oral.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Cara de ángel, alma de diablo Sorority Girls
programme.desc: Wander desea adoptar a un niño, pero Tania, su mujer, no quiere porque se siente amenazada. Además, Valentina y Gabriela se sienten acosadas por un vecino que les dice piropos.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.title: aespa 'Dirty Work' MV
programme.desc: “Dirty Work” is a dance track with catchy synth bass and cool vocal melodies, showing off a more Chill and Cool side of their sound. In the music video, the members turn into bold resistance fighters who take on any kind of “dirty work” for each other, highlighting their strong sense of unity. The performance blends fierce, powerful moves with a hint of sensual flair, creating a stage that's full of contrast and energy.

programme.title: KEY 'HUNTER' MV
programme.desc: SHINee's KEY's title track “HUNTER” is a dance song combining grand bass, heavy kicks, rhythmic guitar riffs, and rich synth pads. Its lyrics capture the “ecstasy in pain” of obsession within a complex relationship, heightened by KEY's dynamic vocals. KENZIE, who has worked on KEY's signature songs, took part in the writing and composing, showcasing their trusted synergy. The performance features refined choreography that highlights KEY's delicate expressiveness and intense energy, delivering a conceptual stage that captivates from start to finish.

programme.title: NCT WISH 'SURF' MV
programme.desc: Filmed entirely on location in Bali, the music video showcases the group's refreshing charm against a backdrop of lush nature. Through the lighthearted story of a surfing club's training camp, 'SURF' amplifies the vibrant summer vibes even further. NCT WISH's latest track 'SURF' is a hybrid dance-pop summer song featured on their 3rd mini album 'COLOR', marking their first summer release since debut. Built on funky, heavy rhythms layered with refreshing sounds, lyrical melodies, and clear, transparent vocals, it delivers a cool burst of energy. The lyrics liken the thrill and freedom of youth to surfing, capturing the excitement of riding the waves.

programme.title: Fats Domino
programme.sub-title: Fats Domino - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. American singer and pianist Fats Domino gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival of 1980. Domino was one of the pioneers of rock and roll music, selling more than 65 million records and having 11 top hits between 1955 and 1960.

programme.title: Woody Herman
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Stochelo Rosenberg & Peter Beets
programme.desc: The treasured compositions of guitarist Django Reinhardt, the founding father of hot club jazz, are engraved in everyone's memory. Although Reinhardt missed two fingers of his left hand, his virtuoso technique was unrivalled. Dutch guitarist Stochelo Rosenberg and pianist Peter Beets now have the pleasure to bring Django's music back to life with their infectious improvisations.

programme.title: Art Blakey
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Freddie Hubbard, Al Grey, Alvin Batiste & Al Casey
programme.sub-title: Freddie Hubbard & The Satchmo Legacy Live in 1987
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. This concert of Freddie Hubbard and the Satchmo Legacy in 1987, highlights the bebop legend's classic style and silky tone. Hubbard is an American jazz trumpeter whose unmistakable and influential tone contributed to new perspectives for modern jazz and bebop. He was also a well-known part of Art Blakey and the Jazz Messengers and is primarily known for playing bebop, hard bop, and post-bop styles from the early '60s onwards.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Coleman Hawkins
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Quincy Jones, Porter Kilbert, Phil Woods & Budd Johnson
programme.desc: ‘Jazz Icons: Quincy Jones' spotlights a young ‘Q' conducting his ‘dream band'—an 18-piece orchestra of world-renowned players such as Clark Terry, Phil Woods, Sahib Shihab, Budd Johnson and Benny Bailey. This recording features 5 songs and is one of the finest examples of big band jazz ever to be captured on film. Shot in Belgium in 1961, this concert is one of the only known visual documents of this legendary tour.

programme.title: John Coltrane
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley, Nat Adderley, Yusuf Lateef & Joe Zawinul
programme.desc: Cannonball Adderley: Live in '63 boasts two beautifully filmed concerts from one of the most celebrated sextets in jazz history, captured at the top of their game. Cannonball Adderley (alto sax), Nat Adderley (cornet), and the masterful Yusef Lateef (tenor sax, flute, oboe), provide a massive three-horn frontline attack, while the stellar rhythm section featuring a pre-Weather Report Joe Zawinul (piano), Sam Jones (bass), and Louis Hayes (drums) fuel the songs with a deep infectious swing. Quincy Jones' "Jessica's Day" leaps from the gate with a huge big band sound that is extraordinary for only six musicians. This recording is a reminder that Cannonball Adderley was one of the most outstanding and highly respected alto saxophonists in the history of jazz. He was a bluesy jazzman who could play anything in superb fashion.

programme.title: Philippe Jordan & Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 6 in F major, Op. 68
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Philippe Jordan and the Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris recorded all of Ludwig van Beethoven's symphonies in 2014-2015. In this program, Jordan conducts Beethoven's Symphony No. 6 in F major, Op. 68, also known as the Pastoral Symphony. Beethoven wrote the work upon completion of his Symphony No. 5. Both symphonies premiered at the same legendary, all-Beethoven concert on December 22, 1808. Symphony No. 6 consists of five movements, of which the last three are played without a break. Each movement carries a title that suggests a scene from life in the countryside. The joyful atmosphere of the first three movements is interrupted by the violent fourth movement ‘Thunder, Storm', as expressed by the piccolos, brass, and timpani. As the storm recedes at the end of the movement, the tranquility returns in the final movement. This performance was recorded at Opéra Bastille in Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.sub-title: Piano works by Rachmaninoff, Beethoven & Glazunov
programme.desc: Russian pianist Nikolay Lugansky has received world-wide praise for his interpretations of the music of Sergei Rachmaninoff. In this wonderful recital, the great pianist presents works by the Russian Romantic composer as well as Ludwig van Beethoven and Alexander Glazunov. Lugansky opens his concert with Beethoven's Piano Sonata No. 14 in C-sharp minor, Op. 27 No. 2, ‘Moonlight', followed by Alexander Glazunov's Piano Sonata No. 2 in E minor, Op. 75. Then Lugansky performs a selection of works by Rachmaninoff: Rachmaninoff's piano transcription of J. S. Bach's Partita No. 3 in E major a selection of Études-Tableaux (Nos. 1, 2, 4, and 8, Op, 33, and Nos. 5 and 6, Op. 39) Lilac (Op. 21, No. 5) Prelude in C minor, Op. 23 No. 7 and Rachmaninoff's transcription of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Lullaby (Op. 16 No. 1). This performance was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall in Moscow, Russia, on June 4, 2021.

programme.title: Martha Argerich
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra in Dvořák's spirited Slavonic Dances, Op. 46 (Nos. 1–8). The Slavonic Dances are full of surprises: when Dvořák composed these 16 folk dances, they instantly scored the newcomer a huge success. Originally composed for two pianos, tonight, the London Symphony Orchestra play the orchestral version of these astonishing works, giving them lively emphasis. Originally composed for piano four hands, they come to life in vivid orchestral color in this performance recorded at St. Luke's, London, on September 23, 2020.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Raphael Pichon, Ensemble Pygmalion, Sabine Devieilhe & Arnaud de Pasquale
programme.sub-title: Mozart - A Gala for the Weber Sisters
programme.desc: On March 23, 1783, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart gave a successful concert at Vienna's Burgtheater that he dedicated to two sopranos: Aloysia and Josepha Weber, the sisters of his wife Constanze. The concert's program would be considered odd by today's standards. The composer's Symphony No. 35 was broken up and interspersed with other compositions, such as concertos, arias, and works for solo piano. Nearly two and a half centuries later, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe, conductor Raphaël Pichon and his Ensemble Pygmalion bring a wonderful concert inspired by that remarkable event. The program includes: ‘Allegro con spirito' of Symphony No. 35, also known as the Haffner Symphony ‘Vorrei spiegarvi, oh Dio', KV 418 ‘Schon lacht der holde Frühling', KV 580 Trio of ‘Die Schlittenfahrt' No. 3, KV 605 Deutscher Tanz No. 6, KV 571 ‘Der Hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' from Mozart's opera Die Zauberflöte ‘Finale: Presto' of Symphony No. 35 ‘Nehmt meinen Dank', KV 383 and ‘Dans un bois solitaire et sombre', KV 308. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Impérial de Compiègne, in Compiègne, France.

programme.title: Thomas Zehetmair, Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: Iván Fischer conducts the Budapest Festival Orchestra in a concert recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary in 2015. The concert opens with Sergei Prokofiev's Overture on Hebrew Themes, Op. 34. After this, Thomas Zehetmair stars as solo violinist in Prokofiev Violin Concerto No. 2, Op. 63. The second part of the concert is features music by Igor Stravinsky. On the program is music composed for the ballet 'Jeu de cartes' (1937) and the Firebird Suite, No. 2 (1919). 'Jeu de cartes' is one of Stravinsky's neo-classical works and consists of three parts ('deals'). The Firebird Suite, No. 2 is based on the music from the ballet of the same name, which was written for Sergei Diaghilev's Ballets Russes and premiered in Paris in 1910.

programme.title: The Moody Blues
programme.desc: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of their landmark album, Days of Future Passed, The Moody Blues took to the road to perform the entire LP live. This film, capturing an electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance of this seminal album. This spectacle of a show features stunning visuals and a unique narration performed by Jeremy Irons, transporting the audience and viewer to the psychedelic dream world of their classic record. Including the iconic hits Nights In White Satin and Tuesday Afternoon, this film truly pays homage to five decades of musical mastery. In this impressive yet intimate auditorium, The Moody Blues have never sounded better.

programme.title: Billy Joel
programme.desc: Having sold more than 150 million records, Billy Joel ranks as one of most popular recording artists and respected entertainers in the world. Throughout the years, Joel's songs have acted as personal and cultural touchstones for millions of people, mirroring his own goal of writing songs that “meant something during the time in which I lived … and transcended that time.” Featuring archive material, music videos and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists Michael Bonner (Uncut Magazine), Hamish MacBain (Shortlist), John Aizlewood (Evening Standard)

programme.title: Al Green
programme.desc: GOSPEL ACCORDING TO AL GREEN looks at Green's transition from hugely successful soul singer to gospel artist and fundamentalist preacher. Filmed in concert in Washington, D.C., in rehearsal in his recording studio, in a service at his Memphis church, and in an extended interview, Green reveals himself to be an electrifying performer, whether singing love songs to women or spiritual ones to God.

Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.
